official_validation.note: Instrument registry supplied this official validation status; filings, earnings-call, valuation, and liquidity underwriting remain separate gates.

sources.layout_suggestion: TALK君認為進入加倉區，交易員建議勿接飛刀
sources.risk: 資金撤出風險資產、監管政策

sources.note: Valuation handoff is input only; it does not make valuation_status complete.
Official evidence handoff is input only; it does not make research_status complete.
Risk handoff is input only; portfolio-risk-management must verify downside, liquidity, and sizing before implementation.

valuation_context.next_step: Run Public Equity Investing comps-valuation or another sourced downstream valuation workflow before setting valuation_status=complete.

missing_inputs: official company or fundamental evidence missing
official_evidence_context.next_step: Use official filings, monthly revenue, SEC companyfacts, earnings-call or management-commentary evidence in PEI specialist research before setting research_status=complete.

risk_inputs.note: Risk inputs are screening inputs only; portfolio-risk-management must still verify downside, liquidity, and implementation readiness.

model_portfolio_inputs.sizing_formula: min(single-name cap, risk budget / downside_or_stop_distance, liquidity cap)
model_portfolio_inputs.note: Screen size is an input only; final sizing requires portfolio-risk-management.

risk_context.next_step: Run Public Equity Investing portfolio-risk-management before treating downside, liquidity, or sizing as implementation-ready.

investment_horizon.near_term_3m: Report-scope artifact uses source-report setup, current quote handoff, and local StockLoop evidence as a timing/risk screen only; 3-month catalyst path is not fully underwritten.
investment_horizon.base_12m: Requires official filings, earnings-call commentary, consensus/estimate context, and valuation work before a 12-month PEI view can be decision-ready.
investment_horizon.long_term_3y: Requires full PEI specialist research or source-backed company/industry underwrite before a 3-year ownership thesis can be decision-ready.
falsifiers: Official revenue, margin, EPS, cash-flow, order, or management commentary contradicts the source-report setup.
Current valuation already prices the optimistic case without margin of safety.
Liquidity, downside distance, or risk budget cannot support model-portfolio sizing.

missing_evidence: 本 report-scope PEI artifact 由 StockLoop 本地 KOL/news、industry thesis 與 quote ledger 生成；尚未逐檔執行完整 Public Equity Investing specialist research

尚缺 consensus、估值模型、流動性模型、downside/stop distance 與完整風險報酬 tie-out
valuation_status=not_run；不得解讀為 decision-ready 或個人化投資建議
crypto_asset 不適用 common-equity PEI 模型，需工具型/ETF 風險路徑

source_row.布局建議: TALK君認為進入加倉區，交易員建議勿接飛刀
source_row.風險: 資金撤出風險資產、監管政策

portfolio_risk.model_portfolio_size: 0% pre-trigger; reassess only after trigger and full PEI evidence
portfolio_risk.downside_or_stop_distance: not independently verified in report-scope PEI artifact
portfolio_risk.hedge_posture: No hedge; model portfolio remains cash for this name until evidence clears
portfolio_risk.add_rule: Open or add only after full PEI specialist workflow confirms thesis, trigger, current price context, liquidity, and risk/reward
portfolio_risk.trim_rule: Trim or keep watch-only if source thesis, price trigger, or company-level evidence weakens
portfolio_risk.exit_rule: Exit/watch-only if thesis evidence fails, price trigger fails, or official evidence contradicts KOL/news setup
portfolio_risk.max_loss_posture: 0 units at risk because model size is 0% in this partial artifact
portfolio_risk.monitoring_cadence: Daily price and weekly fundamentals while in report-scope watch universe
